case_title: INTERNET BLUEPRINT CORPORATION VS. FRANDO CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,540.05 FILED BY INTERNET BLUEPRINT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FRANDO CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-16-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT, HIS LANDLORD. THE AGENT, FRANDO CORP. IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNET BLUEPRINT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVING TRUST OF SARA F. CANNIZZARO $71.51 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $231.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
